attributes.additional_details: There was no need for the  fuel prices to rise the minute the war started and are now climbing at a ridiculous rate
attributes.background: I want the government to hold the petrol retailers to account , as soon as the Iran war started last week the prices started to increase. We the public are getting ripped off .30p a litre at some forcourts

rejection.details:
The Competition and Market Authority monitor prices of fuel. You can read more about the CMA here: https://www.gov.uk/government/organisations/competition-and-markets-authority

We have a open petitions open regarding the price of fuel which you may wish to sign: 
'Prevent fuel companies increasing prices as soon as oil prices rise.'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763394
